props.heading: This is your brand, top to bottom.
props.subheading: Every colour, font, corner and shadow on this page is a design token. Change one in chat and the whole site repaints — no rebuild, no code.

props.heading: Six knobs that change everything
props.subheading: Each card below is styled by the very tokens it describes — so this grid is both the menu and the proof.

features.title: Colour
features.body: Background, text, primary, accent, muted and borders. Tune the palette and every button, link and surface follows.

features.title: Typography
features.body: Body and display fonts, the full size scale, weights and letter-spacing. Headings and prose re-flow to match.

features.title: Corners
features.body: A radius scale from sharp to fully round. Buttons, cards, inputs and tabs each pick where they sit on it.

features.title: Elevation
features.body: A shadow scale from flat to lifted. Cards and buttons borrow from it to feel grounded or floating.

features.title: Density
features.body: One dial scales component padding from compact to roomy — the whole layout breathes tighter or looser.

features.title: Borders
features.body: Hairline to bold. Set the width and colour once; dividers and outlines stay consistent everywhere.

props.heading: Edit in chat. Feel it instantly.
props.subheading: Ask for “a warmer accent and rounder buttons” and this page reskins as you describe it — built from the exact components your real site ships with.

features.title: Primitives feed semantics
features.body: Raw scales — colour ramps, radii, shadows — are referenced by purpose tokens like “primary” and “background”. Change a primitive and every semantic that points at it updates.

features.title: Semantics feed components
features.body: Per-component knobs like button-radius and card-shadow point at the semantic layer. The cascade does the work, so the system never falls out of sync.

props.heading: Make it unmistakably yours.
props.subheading: Open the editor for fine control, or just tell the assistant what you want it to feel like.
